initial_candidates.sql:
WITH category_payment_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    op.payment_type,
    SUM(op.payment_value) AS total_payments
  FROM olist_order_payments op
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
most_preferred_payments AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    total_payments,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY total_payments DESC) AS rn
  FROM category_payment_totals
),
top_payments_per_category AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    total_payments
  FROM most_preferred_payments
  WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
  AVG(total_payments) AS avg_total_payments_most_preferred_method
FROM top_payments_per_category;

WITH payment_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    op.payment_type,
    COUNT(*) AS payment_count
  FROM olist_order_payments op
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
most_preferred_payments AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
  FROM payment_counts
),
preferred_payments AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
  FROM most_preferred_payments
  WHERE rn = 1
),
category_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    SUM(op.payment_value) AS total_payments_per_category
  FROM olist_order_payments op
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name
)
SELECT 
  AVG(ct.total_payments_per_category) AS avg_total_payments_preferred_method
FROM preferred_payments pp
JOIN category_totals ct ON pp.product_category_name = ct.product_category_name;

WITH payment_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    op.payment_type,
    COUNT(*) AS payment_count
  FROM olist_order_payments op
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
preferred_payments AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
  FROM payment_counts
),
most_preferred AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
  FROM preferred_payments
  WHERE rn = 1
),
category_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    SUM(op.payment_value) AS total_payments_per_category
  FROM olist_order_payments op
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  WHERE (p.product_category_name, op.payment_type) IN (
    SELECT product_category_name, payment_type 
    FROM most_preferred
  )
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name
)
SELECT AVG(total_payments_per_category) 
FROM category_totals;

WITH payment_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    op.payment_type,
    COUNT(*) AS payment_count
  FROM olist_order_payments op
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
preferred_payments AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
  FROM payment_counts
),
most_preferred AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
  FROM preferred_payments
  WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
  AVG(payment_count) AS avg_most_preferred_payment_count
FROM most_preferred;

WITH category_payment_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    op.payment_type,
    SUM(op.payment_value) AS total_payments
  FROM olist_order_payments op
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
most_preferred_payment_per_category AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    total_payments,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY total_payments DESC) AS rn
  FROM category_payment_totals
)
SELECT 
  AVG(total_payments) AS avg_total_payments_most_preferred_method
FROM most_preferred_payment_per_category
WHERE rn = 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH payment_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    op.payment_type,

  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name, op.payment_type
),
most_preferred_payments AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC) AS rn
  FROM payment_counts
),
preferred_payments AS (
  SELECT 
    product_category_name,
    payment_type,
    payment_count
  FROM most_preferred_payments
  WHERE rn = 1
),
category_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    p.product_category_name,
    SUM(op.payment_value) AS total_payments_per_category
  FROM olist_order_payments op
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON op.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_category_name
)
SELECT 
  AVG(ct.total_payments_per_category) AS avg_total_payments_preferred_method
FROM preferred_payments pp
JOIN category_totals ct ON pp.product_category_name = ct.product_category_name;
